title: Junior Revenue Manager at Taj SATS Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Taj SATS Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj SATS Digital Technologies:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS Digital Technologies!
